zh.lifeSummary: 當Phillippa Mainwaring於大約1385年出生在英國爾洛維爾 奧福時，她的父親Sir Ranulph Mainwaring . KT ,Knight,  Baronet23歲，母親Catherine Harcourt17歲。她於大約1399年與John De Delves II在英國爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1420年在英國英格蘭爾維布波瑞享年37歲，埋葬在英國爾南特維其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Phillippa Mainwaring于大约1385年出生在英国爾洛維爾 奧福时，她的父亲Sir Ranulph Mainwaring . KT ,Knight,  Baronet23岁，母亲Catherine Harcourt17岁。她于大约1399年与John De Delves II在英国爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1420年在英国英格兰爾維布波瑞享年37岁，埋葬在英国爾南特維其。

nameMeanings.name: Mainwaring
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mesnil-Varin in Saint-Paër (Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie). The placename means ‘domain of Warin’ (see   Waring  ). Compare   Manwaring   and   Mandry  .
Irish: adopted for Ó Manaráin, see Mannering 2.

variants.name: Manwaring
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Mainwaring  .

variants.name: Waring
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of Warren , from the Norman personal name Warin, derived from ancient Germanic Warino, a short form of various compound names based on the element warin ‘protection, shelter’ or ‘guard’. The name was popular in France and among the Normans (see Guerin ).

nameMeanings.name: Phillippa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Philip . In England during the Middle Ages the vernacular name Philip was borne by women as well as men, but female bearers were distinguished in Latin records by this form. It was not, however, used as a regular given name until the 19th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Phillippa Mainwaring was born about 1385, in Lower Peover, Cheshire, England, her father, Sir Ranulph Mainwaring . KT ,Knight,  Baronet, was 23 and her mother, Catherine Harcourt, was 17. She married John De Delves II about 1399, in Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. She died about 1420, in Wybunbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 37, and was buried in Nantwich, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Phillippa Mainwaring est née environ 1385, à Lower Peover, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Ranulph Mainwaring . KT ,Knight,  Baronet, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Catherine Harcourt, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé John De Delves II environ 1399, à Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1420, à Wybunbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterrée à Nantwich, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Phillippa Mainwaring um 1385 in Lower Peover, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Ranulph Mainwaring . KT ,Knight,  Baronet 23 und ihre Mutter Catherine Harcourt 17. Sie hat um 1399 in Cheshire, England John De Delves II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb um 1420 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Wybunbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Nantwich, Cheshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Phillippa Mainwaring è nata il circa 1385 nel Lower Peover, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Sir Ranulph Mainwaring . KT ,Knight,  Baronet, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Catherine Harcourt, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato John De Delves II circa 1399, nel Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie. Morì circa 1420, nel Wybunbury, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolta a Nantwich, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Phillippa Mainwaringが約1385年にイギリスチェシュアイアロウエル ペオバーで生まれた時，父Sir Ranulph Mainwaring . KT ,Knight,  Baronetは23歳，母Catherine Harcourtは17歳であった。約1399年にイギリスチェシュアイアでJohn De Delves IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1420年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアウイブンブリーで37歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアナントウィチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Phillippa Mainwaring(이)가 대략 1385년 영국 체실르 로어 프오버에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Ranulph Mainwaring . KT ,Knight,  Baronet(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine Harcourt(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 대략 1399년 영국 체실르에서 John De Delves II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1420년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 윈이버버이에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 난트위치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Phillippa Mainwaring nasceu aproximadamente 1385, em Lower Peover, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Ranulph Mainwaring . KT ,Knight,  Baronet, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Harcourt, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com John De Delves II aproximadamente 1399, em Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1420, em Wybunbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 37 anos, e foi sepultada em Nantwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Phillippa Mainwaring родилась около 1385 г. в местности лоуир пеовир, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Ranulph Mainwaring . KT ,Knight,  Baronet было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Catherine Harcourt, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John De Delves II около 1399 г. в местности чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла около 1420 г. в местности вибунбури, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 37 лет и была похоронена в местности нантвич, чешир, Англия.

sm.about 1385–about 1420: e tusa o le 1385–e tusa o le 1420

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Phillippa Mainwaring nació aproximadamente 1385, en Lower Peover, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Ranulph Mainwaring . KT ,Knight,  Baronet, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Catherine Harcourt, tenía 17 años. Se casó con John De Delves II aproximadamente 1399, en Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1420, en Wybunbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultada en Nantwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
